meaning: n.<法>爱丽舍宫,巴黎的法国总统官邸
examples: The khaki Bedouin tent was pitched just across from the Elysee Palace.
Soon afterwards the company's board members were summoned to the Elysee.
In the Elysee Palace, in contrast, a more respectful analysis is offered.
Mr Hollande was sworn in for a five-year term at the Elysee Palace in central Paris.
Hotel Elysee's Monkey Bar dates back to 1936 and is really more of a restaurant than a proper bar.
